data.headline: Home Remodeling Services in Connecticut
data.subheadline: Full-service home remodeling for homeowners throughout Fairfield County and New Haven County. Kitchens, bathrooms, basements, additions, flooring, and more.

data.title: Our Services
data.subtitle: Full-scope remodeling and improvement services , available as standalone projects or as part of a larger scope.

items.title: Kitchen Remodeling
items.summary: Cabinet layout, countertop fabrication, tile work, lighting, plumbing, electrical, and appliance coordination. Full kitchen remodels from demolition to final walkthrough.
items.image_alt: Kitchen remodeling project by BuiltWell CT featuring custom cabinetry and countertops in a Connecticut home

items.title: Bathroom Remodeling
items.summary: Tile, waterproofing, fixtures, vanities, shower systems, lighting, and ventilation , carefully sequenced for tight spaces.
items.image_alt: Luxury bathroom remodel by BuiltWell CT with tile shower and vanity in New Haven County, Connecticut

items.title: Basement Finishing
items.summary: Framing, insulation, drywall, flooring, lighting, electrical, egress windows, and full bathroom builds when needed.
items.image_alt: Basement finishing project by BuiltWell CT showing framing and construction in a Connecticut home

items.title: Flooring
items.summary: Hardwood, engineered hardwood, luxury vinyl plank, tile, and carpet installation throughout Fairfield and New Haven Counties.
items.image_alt: Hardwood flooring installation by BuiltWell CT in a Connecticut home remodeling project

items.title: Home Additions
items.summary: Single-story and second-story additions, sunrooms, garage conversions, and bump-outs with full structural and finish work.
items.image_alt: Home addition and house expansion project by BuiltWell CT in Connecticut

items.title: Interior Painting
items.summary: Walls, ceilings, trim, doors, and built-ins. Professional-grade paints with proper surface preparation on every project.
items.image_alt: Interior painting service by BuiltWell CT in a Connecticut home

items.title: Interior Carpentry
items.summary: Custom millwork, built-in cabinetry, wainscoting, crown molding, coffered ceilings, closet systems, and finish trim.
items.image_alt: Interior carpentry and custom millwork by BuiltWell CT in Connecticut

items.title: Attic Conversions
items.summary: Converting unfinished attics into bedrooms, offices, or playrooms , structural assessment through final finish.
items.image_alt: Attic conversion remodeling by BuiltWell CT creating livable space in a Connecticut home

items.title: Decks & Porches
items.summary: Pressure-treated lumber, composite, and hardwood. Covered porches, screened-in structures, pergolas, and multi-level decks.
items.image_alt: Deck and porch construction by BuiltWell CT for a Connecticut homeowner

items.title: Design & Planning
items.summary: Space planning, material selection, finish coordination, and project documentation before construction begins.
items.image_alt: Remodeling design and planning consultation by BuiltWell CT in Connecticut

items.title: Comfort & Accessibility
items.summary: Grab bars, roll-in showers, wider doorways, ramp installation, and first-floor adaptations for all ages and abilities.
items.image_alt: Comfort and accessibility remodeling by BuiltWell CT with grab bars and roll-in shower in Connecticut

items.title: Insurance Reconstruction
items.summary: Rebuilding homes after fire, water, and storm damage. We handle the full reconstruction once cleanup is complete, working directly with your carrier.
items.image_alt: BuiltWell CT contractor meeting homeowner for insurance reconstruction assessment in Connecticut

data.title: Our Remodeling Process
data.subtitle: We follow the same five-step process on every project. It keeps jobs on schedule and keeps you informed at every stage.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.description: We visit your home or connect via Google Meet at no charge and with no obligation, so we can understand the scope before we put anything in writing.

steps.title: Planning
steps.description: You receive a written proposal with a clear breakdown of exactly what's included, the full project timeline, and the cost. No vague ranges, no surprises later.

steps.title: Selections
steps.description: We guide you through every material choice and communicate lead times upfront, so nothing delays construction once the schedule is set.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Construction begins on the agreed start date. Crews show up on time, daily updates are sent, and the job site is cleaned every evening.

steps.title: Walkthrough
steps.description: When the work is finished, we walk through the project together. Nothing is signed off until you're satisfied with every detail.

data.title: Materials We Stand Behind
data.subtitle: We work exclusively with proven brands trusted by contractors and homeowners across Connecticut.
